title: Bolsonaro’s son runs for president with a mission: Get dad out of prison
summary_full: Flávio Bolsonaro, 44, says he’s a more measured version of his father: “I’m the Bolsonaro you always wanted.”
summary_public: Flávio Bolsonaro, 44, says he’s a more measured version of his father: “I’m the Bolsonaro you always wanted.”
